title: nvm_overwrite DataLost error carries the NVM id for targeted recovery
description: Error::DataLost { id: u16 } lets callers identify exactly which NVM object was lost in the delete-then-add race. Without the id, the caller would have to track state externally. Contributors might suggest replacing this with a combined atomic server-side update operation, but that does not exist in the wolfHSM protocol, so carrying the id in the error is the correct response to a real protocol limitation.
